---
title: "Introduction"
---

## Research objectives and motivation

State the motivation for the research and the overarching question(s) the thesis addresses. The field has evolved rapidly over the past decade [@smith2024example]. A useful textbook framing is offered by @example2020book.

## Thesis overview

Provide an overview of the three constituent papers and how they relate to one another. Per policy section 13.10, include here the rationale for submitting in journal format and an account of how the thesis has been constructed.

## Thesis structure

Summarise the structure of the remaining chapters.

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
